tests.test_body:
define float @src2(float %arg1) {
; CHECK-LABEL: define float @src2(
; CHECK-SAME: float [[ARG1:%.*]]) {
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V2:%.*]] = fadd float [[ARG1]], 0.000000e+00
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V3:%.*]] = call float @llvm.fabs.f32(float [[V2]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[V4:%.*]] = fsub float [[V2]], [[V3]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret float [[V4]]
  %v2 = fadd float %arg1, 0.000000e+00
  %v3 = call float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %v2)
  %v4 = fsub float %v2, %v3
  ret float %v4
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.fabs.f32(float) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

issue.title: Missed optimization: fold away neutral fadd 0.0 before fabs
issue.body:
```
define double @src(double %arg0, float %arg1) {
  %v2 = fadd float %arg1, 0.000000e+00
  %v3 = call noundef float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %v2)
  %v4 = fpext float %v3 to double
  %v5 = fcmp olt double %arg0, %v4
  %v6 = select i1 %v5, double %v4, double %arg0
  ret double %v6
}

define double @tgt(double %arg0, float %arg1) {
  %v2 = call noundef float @llvm.fabs.f32(float %arg1)
  %v3 = fpext float %v2 to double
  %v4 = fcmp olt double %arg0, %v3
  %v5 = select i1 %v4, double %v3, double %arg0
  ret double %v5
}
```

Alive2: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/WyK7Q9
Godbolt: https://godbolt.org/z/n36zdahPM

Pattern found in https://github.com/dtcxzyw/llvm-opt-benchmark/blob/main/bench/opencv/optimized/ts_func.ll
issue.author: zxt5

comments.author: VedantParanjape
comments.body: I would like to work on this!

comments.author: nikic
VedantParanjape
comments.body:
> [@VedantParanjape](https://github.com/VedantParanjape) See canIgnoreSignBitOfZero().

I triaged this issue and it seems instsimplify already has infra built to handle this here: https://github.com/VedantParanjape/llvm-project/blob/f15a6c99fa552f82dad46e6bf3c8ff958c8b6e7f/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp#L5701

But this `(FMF.noSignedZeros() || cannotBeNegativeZero(Op0, Q))` part of the if returns false and this optimization doesn't happen.

```
match: 1
FMF.noSignedZeros(): 0
cannotBeNegativeZero: 0
```

comments.author: VedantParanjape
comments.body: @nikic pushed a PR with the fix.
